languages.text: Говорят, в пустоте Простора Коронус до сих пор блуждает часть уничтоженного мира Зарков, в толще которого дремлет проклятый кусок древнего храма некронов, зараженных страшным вирусом Свежевателей.

Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible Flayer virus.
languages.original_text: Говорят, в пустоте Простора Коронус до сих пор блуждает часть уничтоженного мира Зарков, в толще которого дремлет проклятый кусок древнего храма некронов, зараженных страшным вирусом Свежевателей.

traits.locale_text: Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible virus of the Flayers.

Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible virus of the Flayers.

Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible virus of the Flayers.

languages.text: ザルクの破壊された世界の一部は、まだコーロナス・エクスパンションの虚無に漂っていると言われている。その深くに眠る古代ネクロンの神殿の呪われた塊は、フレイアーズの恐ろしいウイルスに感染している。
languages.original_text: Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible virus of the Flayers.

traits.locale_text: ザルクの破壊された世界の一部は、まだコーロナス・エクスパンションの虚無に漂っていると言われている。その深くに眠る古代ネクロンの神殿の呪われた塊は、フレイアーズの恐ろしいウイルスに感染している。

languages.text: 据说，扎尔科夫世界毁灭后留下的一块残骸，仍在科罗努斯扩区的虚空中漂浮。而在其深处，沉睡着被诅咒的古老太空死灵的神庙遗迹，里面肆虐着可怕的剥皮者病毒。
languages.original_text: Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible Flayer virus.

traits.locale_text: 据说，扎尔科夫世界毁灭后留下的一块残骸，仍在科罗努斯扩区的虚空中漂浮。而在其深处，沉睡着被诅咒的古老太空死灵的神庙遗迹，里面肆虐着可怕的剥皮者病毒。

languages.text: On pense qu'une partie de Zarkov, séparée du reste de la planète lors de sa destruction, dérive encore à ce jour dans les Étendues de Koronus. Il sommeillerait dans ses profondeurs des vestiges maudits de l'ancien temple des Nécrons infecté par le terrible virus du Dépeceur.
languages.original_text: Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible Flayer virus.

traits.locale_text: On pense qu'une partie de Zarkov, séparée du reste de la planète lors de sa destruction, dérive encore à ce jour dans les Étendues de Koronus. Il sommeillerait dans ses profondeurs des vestiges maudits de l'ancien temple des Nécrons infecté par le terrible virus du Dépeceur.

languages.text: Parte del mundo destruido de Zarkov, según se cree, sigue vagando por el vacío de la Extensión de Koronus. Se dice que en sus profundidades duerme un fragmento maldito del templo de los Necrones, infectado con el terrible virus Desollador.
languages.original_text: Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible Flayer virus.

traits.locale_text: Parte del mundo destruido de Zarkov, según se cree, sigue vagando por el vacío de la Extensión de Koronus. Se dice que en sus profundidades duerme un fragmento maldito del templo de los Necrones, infectado con el terrible virus Desollador.

languages.text: Yok edilmiş Zarkov dünyasının bir parçasının hâlâ Koronus Enginliği'nin uçsuzunda sürüklendiğine inanılıyor. Söylentilere göre bu parçanın derinliklerinde, Nekronların Deri Yüzen virüsüyle enfekte olmuş kadim tapınağının lanetli bir yığını uyumaktaymış.
languages.original_text: Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible Flayer virus.

traits.locale_text: Yok edilmiş Zarkov dünyasının bir parçasının hâlâ Koronus Enginliği'nin uçsuzunda sürüklendiğine inanılıyor. Söylentilere göre bu parçanın derinliklerinde, Nekronların Deri Yüzen virüsüyle enfekte olmuş kadim tapınağının lanetli bir yığını uyumaktaymış.

languages.text: Ein Teil der zerstörten Welt Zarkov treibt angeblich noch immer in der Leere der Koronus-Ausdehnung. Es heißt, dass in ihren Tiefen ein verfluchter Klumpen des alten Tempels der Necrons schlummert, der mit dem schrecklichen Virus der Häuter infiziert ist.
languages.original_text: Part of the destroyed world of Zarkov is believed to still drift in the void of the Koronus Expanse. It is said that slumbering deep within it is a cursed lump of the ancient temple of the Necrons infected with the terrible Flayer virus.

traits.locale_text: Ein Teil der zerstörten Welt Zarkov treibt angeblich noch immer in der Leere der Koronus-Ausdehnung. Es heißt, dass in ihren Tiefen ein verfluchter Klumpen des alten Tempels der Necrons schlummert, der mit dem schrecklichen Virus der Häuter infiziert ist.
